title: aster altaicus var. tenuicaulis
intro: Aster altaicus var. tenuicaulis, also known as the Korean white aster or white flowering Korean mountain aster, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Aster altaicus var. tenuicaulis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as its potential to act as an antiviral and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
